response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content: 00:00-03:33 is merch presentation. 2. Identified vocal music in the final scene (03:33-04:30) as a song playing over a promotional image. 3. Researched the song 'Kanseitou yori' (From the Control Tower) by Hakuya Koyori. 4. Found the song title, artist, and lyrics on a reliable site. 5. Constructed the JSON object.
response.global_summary: The video shows a promotional presentation by VTuber Hakuya Koyori regarding her merchandise for her "Birthday Live 2026". The video concludes with a promotional image accompanied by her new original song, 'Kanseitou yori'.

scenes.description: Hakuya Koyori presents merchandise from her 2026 birthday collection, talking to the audience.
Promotional image for the 'Birthday Live 2026' is displayed, while the song 'Kanseitou yori' plays in the background.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Point of light, control tower
Towards the other side of the sandstorm
I wrote as if in prayer
About what comes next
Radio name: Anonymous
Have you received my letter?
Since when did this world
Become so indifferent
It's become strangely quiet
I became anxious
I remembered
Silently keeping my lips sealed
I cannot end it like this
I hate that
Dreams were supposed to be more
Selfish, right?
Respond to me, laugh, notice me
Even though I'm here, you're so mean
The light that reaches no one
What should I do to convey it?
No matter what, I want to convey it to you
Radio name: Anonymous
Am I just a coward?
Or is it that in this world
Am I just a nuisance?
Even so, I will continue to write
I will shout, looking unsightly
Even if I get rejected, I love you
Isn't it fine?
Isn't it fine?
It was fun, right?
It was frustrating, right?
I don't want to talk to myself anymore
'Did I keep you waiting?'
'I wasn't really waiting for you, you know'
Calling it a dream, that was just me
Are you ready?
Respond to me, laugh, notice me
Even though I'm here, you're so mean
The light that reaches no one
I alone will continue to call it light
In the middle of the night, from the control tower
I will illuminate the world (you)
